headlines.title: Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages, watchdog reveals
headlines.description: A public spending watchdog examines the property arrangements of royals including Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor.

headlines.title: World-first vaccine designed by AI could protect against whole families of viruses
headlines.description: Cambridge scientists say they have, for the first time, tested a vaccine designed by AI.

headlines.title: Former student charged after University of Surrey crossbow attack
headlines.description: A university campus safety officer was seriously injured in the attack in Guildford on Thursday.

headlines.title: How the contest is shaping up two weeks ahead of crucial Makerfield by-election
headlines.description: What stood out from the Question Time exchanges between candidates in the Makerfield by-election?

headlines.title: UK in most dangerous period I've known, military chief says
headlines.description: Russian incursions into UK defences risk crossing a line, Chief of the Defence Staff Sir Richard Knighton tells the BBC.

headlines.title: The deeply contentious debate around what it means to be English
headlines.description: The debate about English identity has been a perennial one but has now taken on a harder edge

headlines.description: The former England manager has made a documentary looking at the issues affecting boys and young men.

headlines.title: One in four births in England is now emergency caesarean, BBC analysis shows
headlines.description: The shift marks a significant rise over the last five years, but experts say there is no single, clear explanation for the increase.

headlines.title: A-level maths exam marking to be watched closely by regulator after students 'overwhelmed'
headlines.description: More than 20,000 people sign a petition calling for a review of a paper they say was significantly more challenging than any past exam.

headlines.title: Paddleboard firm owner who caused four deaths has bid to cut sentence refused
headlines.description: Nerys Lloyd was sentenced to 10 years and six months for gross negligence manslaughter in April 2025.

headlines.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
headlines.description: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.

headlines.title: 'We moved in with 17 strangers so we wouldn't be lonely' - why co-housing is on the rise

headlines.title: Who can buy shares in Elon Musk's SpaceX?

headlines.title: Tough cookies: How pop group Le Sserafim overcame band tensions and internet trolls
headlines.description: The K-pop band say accepting their flaws and embracing humour took them to a new level of success.

headlines.title: Do single 20-somethings need AI to make first move on dating apps? Hinge's boss thinks so

headlines.title: Mangrove forests are healing after decades of human destruction

headlines.title: Kanya King, who founded Mobo Awards to champion black music, dies at 57
headlines.description: King overcame doubters and mortgaged her house to launch the influential ceremony 30 years ago.

headlines.title: Greens can bring hope and joy, Makerfield candidate says
headlines.description: Green candidate Sarah Wakefield pledged action on two "big buckets of issues".

headlines.title: 'Extremely intelligent' bear on the run in Japan after injuring four people
headlines.description: Authorities said that a bear in north-east Japan has eluded capture by opening a window.

headlines.title: Helicopter deaths 'devastating' for Royal Navy
headlines.description: Tributes continue to be paid to three crew members killed in a crash in Devon.

headlines.title: Kate Winslet delights young film fan with surprise call
headlines.description: Teenager Eryn, who has been blind since brith, made a three hour round-trip for a film screening because there was no local accessible cinema.

headlines.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
headlines.description: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.

headlines.title: Football regulator faces 'defining test' over potential Derby investment
headlines.description: English football's independent regulator faces a "defining test" as Saudi Arabian government official Turki Al-Sheikh attempts to invest in Derby County, says Amnesty International.
